label: Mock KHAITE buyer feedback sample
caveat: Synthetic demo data for automation workflow testing. This is not real KHAITE customer data.

reviews.text: The neckline and knit feel refined, and it works with tailored trousers. I wish the product page showed the back view more clearly.
Beautiful weight and color. Runs slightly short on a longer torso, so the styling photos helped but the measurement guidance did not.
Customer asked whether the knit would stretch with wear and whether the cropped proportion is intentional.

fitFeedback: True through shoulders, cropped through body.
Buyers want garment length and stretch language.

reviews.text: The denim feels substantial and the leg shape looks modern without being extreme. The rise was exactly what I hoped for.
Great wash, but I exchanged for a size up. The page says relaxed, but the waist felt more structured than expected.
Returned because the inseam looked different from the photo and I could not tell how tall the model was.

fitFeedback: Structured waist; consider recommending size up between sizes.
Leg shape praised when fit is right.
Model height and inseam context would reduce uncertainty.

reviews.text: The leather is soft but still holds the sculptural shape. It looks special enough for evening but is quiet for day.
Several shoppers asked whether a phone, card case, keys, and lipstick fit inside at the same time.
Love the shape. I wanted one clear photo of the interior and strap drop before deciding.

fitFeedback: Capacity questions repeat across service notes.
Interior view and strap drop would improve confidence.
Material quality is a strong purchase driver.
